title: oldenlandia wallichii
intro: Oldenlandia wallichii, also known as Indian Tinospora or Tinospora cordifolia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia wallichii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve liver function, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and immunomodulator. Oldenlandia wallichii is often prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in various traditional remedies.
